entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary cereal crop studied in the context of value chain actors in Mali

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental and biological pressures affecting the utilization and marketability of sorghum

entities.name: SORGHUM VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The system of actors and activities involved in the production, processing, and distribution of sorghum

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN ACTORS
entities.description: Social groups including growers, processors, consumers, and traders involved in the sorghum value chain

entities.name: SORGHUM CULTIVARS
entities.description: Specific varieties of sorghum introduced and promoted by breeding programs

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs designed to develop and promote improved sorghum varieties

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: The country where the study on sorghum value chain actors was conducted

entities.name: SUDAN ZONE
entities.description: An agroecological zone in Mali with specific production and utilization realities

entities.name: SAVANNA ZONE
entities.description: An agroecological zone in Mali with specific production and utilization realities

entities.name: AGROECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Geographic areas characterized by distinct environmental conditions that influence crop traits demand

entities.name: TRAIT PREFERENCES
entities.description: The specific characteristics of sorghum demanded by different value chain actors

entities.name: MIXED METHODS
entities.description: A research approach combining surveys, focus group discussions, and key informant interviews

entities.name: SURVEYS
entities.description: A data collection tool used to gather information from respondents

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative data collection method used to understand group perspectives

entities.name: KEY INFORMANT INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A qualitative data collection method used to gather expert or specific actor insights

entities.name: INTERSECTIONAL APPROACH
entities.description: An analytical framework used to examine how overlapping social identities influence decisions

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN APPROACH
entities.description: An analytical framework used to study the flow of products and the roles of actors in the chain

entities.name: SORGHUM GROWERS
entities.description: Actors responsible for the production of sorghum

entities.name: PROCESSORS
entities.description: Actors involved in the processing of sorghum grains

entities.name: CONSUMERS
entities.description: Actors who utilize and consume sorghum

entities.name: TRADERS
entities.description: Actors involved in the marketing and sale of sorghum

entities.name: GENDER DYNAMICS
entities.description: The roles, interests, and challenges of men and women that influence trait choices and adoption

entities.name: HIGH-YIELD
entities.description: A desirable characteristic of sorghum varieties developed by research institutes

entities.name: PROCESSING SECTOR
entities.description: The industry in Mali involved in the processing of sorghum
